title: ilex dubia var. mollis
intro: Ilex dubia var. mollis, also known as the Himalayan holy tree, is a variety of the Ilex dubia plant, a shrub or small tree native to the Himalayan region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties, which have been shown to aid in the treatment of various health conditions. The health benefits of Ilex dubia var. mollis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide antioxidant properties, making it a valuable herbal remedy. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant are typically used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
